allSuggestions.reason: It’s the concrete sponsorship context Toby referenced (priority-setting rooms), not generic sponsorship.

allSuggestions.value: high-ambiguity forums — what about them makes you feel underprepared?

allSuggestions.evidence: “avoid high-ambiguity forums because I do not want to sound underprepared.”

allSuggestions.value: Who is already backing your strategic work, and who is not yet there?

allSuggestions.evidence: “I want milestones that show progress before the next cycle”
allSuggestions.better_as: Who will sponsor the decision in the room, and what forward milestone will show your influence before the next cycle?
